title: CalculationValuationAgentPartyEnum
description: Specification of which party is calculating the value of collateral to be delivered or returned.

oneOf.title: Party1
oneOf.description: Party 1 will calculate the value of collateral to be delivered or returned.

oneOf.title: Party2
oneOf.description: Party 2 will calculate the value of collateral to be delivered or returned.

oneOf.title: PartyMakingDemand
oneOf.description: The party making the demand will calculate the value of collateral to be delivered or returned.
